testimonies.name: Elisa
testimonies.title: AMAZING
testimonies.testimony: A few months out from my wedding, I reached out to Elizabeth in need of a lot of help organizing, planning, and executing many ideas. Elizabeth was INCREDIBLE. She did not only help make the day run smoothly, but spent so much time hand writing all of my guest escort cards using beautiful calligraphy and writing each guests name on a bow on all of our menus to add a personal touch. She even met me at my final dress fitting when my mom was unable to travel in town. On the wedding day, Elizabeth and her husband Josh went above and beyond. They brought such a calm and efficient presence that is so needed on a wedding day. The day couldn't have been more perfect and my husband and I are so glad we had Elizabeth to make the day so special.

testimonies.name: Katie
testimonies.title: Wedding Planning - without the stress!
testimonies.testimony: My husband and I attempted to plan our entire wedding ourselves, but about 4-5 months prior I totally panicked when I realized I just didnt know what I didnt know; Enter Liz (a godsend!). Liz is fantastic to work with - she's calm, well organized, and creative. Exactly what you need from a planner! Liz helped us think of every last thing we needed to prep for before our wedding weekend so that there weren't any surprises. Liz interfaced extremely well with our other vendors and kept them on track leading up to and day of. She kept everyone informed as we developed and fine tuned our detailed day of schedule, which ensured everything went smoothly. When it comes to creativity, Liz is who you want in your corner. She has a talent for calligraphy and hand wrote all of our place cards, hand painted names on all of the ribbons around our menus (and hunted through stores for the perfect ribbon color), hand painted our table numbers, and got a special stamp made of one of the key design elements throughout our wedding. Liz and her team also constructed 100 welcome bags from the various items I shipped to her and then hand delivered all of them to our different hotel blocks. After our wedding, she and her staff even packed up and stored all the items from the wedding overnight and then delivered them to us the next day. These were the types of things I didn’t know how to plan for (and that kept me up at night) before we hired Liz, and she just simply handled them without an issue. If you are looking for full or partial planning, I highly recommend working with Liz!

testimonies.name: Sophia
testimonies.title: The guardian angel of weddings
testimonies.testimony: Hiring Elizabeth for month-of coordination was truly one of the best decisions that we made during the wedding planning process. We experienced a fairly large hiccup six months out when our restaurant buy-out canceled, and Elizabeth went above and beyond in ensuring that we found a suitable replacement. She is someone who will truly go to bat for you. Elizabeth was kind, helpful, responsive, and organized throughout the entire process of working with her. We were able to let go and relax the last week before our wedding because we knew her team had our back. They handled deliveries, pick-ups, moving stuff, set-up, ceremony timing-- you name it and they were there. Our September 2025 wedding day was fantastic (I might be biased, but probably the best wedding I've been to) and it went so smoothly in large part to Elizabeth and her crew. True pros. In a nutshell: Hire Elizabeth!

testimonies.name: Haniya
testimonies.title: Elizabeth is essential!
testimonies.testimony: We are beyond grateful to have had Elizabeth as our wedding coordinator. From the very beginning, she went above and beyond to make the entire planning process smooth and stress-free. She was always available for questions, advice, and suggestions, and her proactive approach gave us so much peace of mind. Elizabeth reached out to all of our vendors ahead of time, introduced herself as our coordinator, and became their main point of contact—saving us from a flood of last-minute questions. She even attended all vendor meetings, collected insurance certificates, and delivered them directly to the venue, taking an enormous weight off our shoulders. She created a detailed and thoughtful timeline for our wedding weekend and adjusted it in real time on the big day to make sure everything ran seamlessly while still fitting in all the moments that were important to us. Her attention to detail extended beyond coordination—she helped us make boutonnieres, used her beautiful calligraphy skills for our table number cards, and even stepped in with her team to lay out linens and chargers when the venue staff was running behind. What truly stood out was Elizabeth’s curiosity and eagerness to learn. Coordinating a South Asian wedding with unique customs and traditions can be complex, but she embraced it wholeheartedly, ensuring that every detail was respected and executed perfectly. Thanks to her, our wedding day was everything we dreamed of and more. I cannot recommend Elizabeth enough to anyone planning a wedding—she is professional, dedicated, creative, and an absolute joy to work with!

testimonies.name: Syndi
testimonies.title: Sanity Saver
testimonies.testimony: I had done all the planning for my wedding by myself and realized 2 months out that I needed someone to deal with the day of stuff because I didn't want to be stressed out about anything else. BEST DECISION I EVER MADE. After talking with Elizabeth I knew the fit would be great, I come from the TV world and was literally looking for someone to produce the day of. Elizabeth hooked me up with Erica & Marissa to run the show for me. All 3 went above and beyond to make sure that any behind the scenes issues remained behind the scenes. They helped us plan a timeline that made sense and dealt with all the extra details that needs to be done day of, from being there when vendors showed up to helping get some last minute DIY table decorations in place, and even moving florals from ceremony to reception. I highly recommend them, it was a pleasure and sanity saver to work with them.

testimonies.name: Kathleen
testimonies.title: The Tremendous ET Team
testimonies.testimony: Elizabeth was extremely helpful throughout the wedding planning process. She offered her expertise, knowledge and guidance every step of the way. She was present for all of our meetings with vendors and helped ask meaningful questions during those meetings that we wouldn't have known or thought to ask otherwise. Her and the team were crucial on the day of our wedding in setting up, organizing groups for photos, coordinating with vendors, working with the venue and cleaning up. They made sure all of the behind the scenes events were happening seamlessly so that the day would flow perfectly. She was our biggest hype girl and we would absolutely work with her again if we had to do it again. I'm sad we don't get to talk to her all the time anymore!!!

testimonies.name: Connie
testimonies.title: Organized Wedding BFF
testimonies.testimony: Elizabeth and her assistant (Josh) were a MUCH needed addition to our wedding weekend! She delivered beyond expectations. Always prompt, helpful, and a guiding hand I would wholeheartedly recommend her as a coordinator. Without her I would have lost my mind. She went above and beyond in every way, supported and offered creative ideas (in line with budget), and was so generous with her time. Truly a joy to work with. The wedding BFF every bride deserves!

testimonies.name: Elizabeth
testimonies.title: Masterful Execution by Elizabeth & Team!
testimonies.testimony: Choosing Elizabeth Treimanis Events for partial wedding planning was, hands down, the best money we spent throughout the entire process. We thought we could handle everything ourselves, but as the stress mounted, she stepped in and truly kept us sane. Her value was immediate. From the moment we started working with her, she provided constant support and strategic guidance, acting as our ultimate resource. She made many helpful recommendations, connecting us with true professionals who perfectly matched our style and budget, saving us countless hours of searching and vetting. On the day itself, she and her team was a master of logistics. She took all the moving parts, all the last-minute details, and masterfully pulled the entire day together flawlessly. Everything was seamless, smooth, and perfectly timed, allowing us to completely relax and actually enjoy being the couple getting married. If you are debating hiring a planner, especially for partial services, stop debating and hire her immediately. She is worth every penny and more!
